title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Postcard Hotels South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Postcard Hotels South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Postcard Hotels South Asia Partners are looking for an experienced Reservation Manager based out of Patna. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Postcard Hotels South Asia Partners:
Postcard Hotels South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Customer Relations

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Postcard Hotels South Asia Partners!
